Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Apr-25-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY, CARPENTERS PENSION, CARPENTERS ANNUITY, CARPENTERS TRAINING, NORTHERN CALIFORNIA CARPENTERS REGIONAL COUNCIL'S PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported
